title: Level Up
description: Level Up is a vanilla-friendly modpack that is fun and easy to play.
body:
# Level Up

Start your adventure and level up today with this vanilla friendly modpack.
Level Up is a simple Minecraft modpack focusing on performance and QOL features, while making Mincraft feel like a new game.

## Modloader
Level Up is built on the forge mod loader.

## Disclaimer
Level Up contains content mods so it can not be used on servers(Unless Installed to the server), but includes essential so you can play with your friends.

## Versions
Level Up runs on Minecraft version 1.20.1 and is on version 1.2.

# Questions
If you have any questions about the mod or suggestions please contact me on my discord server. (I'm chronically online...)
